basics.name: LI Baichuan
basics.summary: Year 2 Computer Engineering student at HKUST. Interested in Robotics, LLMs, and mobile development.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)

publications.name: AutoTour: Automatic Photo Tour Guide with Smartphones and LLMs
publications.summary: An automatic photo tour guide system leveraging smartphones and large language models.

publications.name: MMRouter: A Routing Mechanism for Multi-Modal Input Queries
publications.summary: A routing mechanism for multi-modal input queries that achieves optimal cost-performance tradeoff in model selection.

teaching.institution: HKUST, Department of Computer Science and Engineering

portfolio.name: 挪啦 (NuoLa)
portfolio.description: A Flutter app for critical SMS detection and real-time alert triggering. Deployed on China's major Android app galleries and market-ready.

portfolio.name: VocabuStory
portfolio.description: An LLM-powered Flutter application that improves language learning efficiency through customized narrative generation.
